item.title: Analysis of Monzo through the lens of Entrepreneurial Ecosystems
item.description: This article is a stripped-down version of an academic report I’ve written on fintech ecosystems and what role a keystone organisations plays in it. Background This article analyzes Monzo – a challenger bank based in the UK to understand the business model and the role they play inside the ecosystem. The ecosystem analysis will be done through the lens of academic literature on business ecosystems to further understand the strategies behind the ecosystem.

item.title: Hello there.
item.description: Hello there, I’m Haris. I am a product manager and engineer from Maldives. I started coding at the age of 12 by reverse engineering the webpages I would save from the web, and running Python scripts on Symbian OS (PyS60). These days I work mostly with Go and JavaScript. I am currently working at Payer - A FinTech startup that I co-founded to create a mobile wallet for Maldives. Besides engineering, I am passionate about product management.

item.title: Hello Hugo
item.description: I started blogging in late 2007 on Blogger, and since then I’ve had multiple blogs (Blogger, WordPress, etc.). This time I decided to switch to a static generator to keep my content on GitHub.

item.title: GEO calculations with MySQL
item.description: With the introduction of apps like Foursquare, apps using user’s locations are now proliferating. I am currently working on an application which uses user’s geo-coordinates to do some calculations. Originially my plan was to store the geo-coordinates in the database as a string and do the calculation on the application level. I did some additional research to see a better way to do this. These are the functionalities I want to achieve:

item.title: Challenges with accepting online payments in Maldives
item.description: This article is outdated and does not reflect on the current environment. Entrepreneurs and tech geeks has attempted to create internet based businesses in the Maldives since the early 2000s. Most of them are no longer around due the challenges they faced with running an internet venture. One of the very common challenges shared by most entrepreneurs and software developers of Maldives is not having access to an affordable payment gateway solution.
